Meta.featuresIndexTitle: AI Features | Music & Video Creation Tools
Meta.featuresIndexDescription: Explore all Tunee AI features: music generation, music video creation, lip sync, AI dancing, motion control, and more. The all-in-one platform for AI creative content.
Meta.musicVideoGeneratorTitle: Best AI Music Video Generator | Create Music Videos with AI
Meta.musicVideoGeneratorDescription: Transform your music into stunning AI-generated music videos with Tunee. Upload audio, choose your style, and generate professional music videos in minutes.
Meta.lipSyncTitle: Best AI Lip Sync Video Generator | Tunee
Meta.lipSyncDescription: Transform any portrait into a singing character with Tunee's AI lip sync technology. Create perfectly synchronized mouth movements for your music — no filming required.
Meta.aiDancingTitle: Best AI Dancing Video Generator | AI Dance from Photo
Meta.aiDancingDescription: Transform any image into a dynamic AI dancing video with Tunee. Upload a photo, choose a dance style, and watch your virtual artist come to life in seconds.
Meta.motionControlTitle: Best AI Motion Control Video Generator | Tunee
Meta.motionControlDescription: Create precise AI motion-controlled videos with Tunee. Direct your virtual artist's movements, expressions, and camera angles for professional-quality results.
Meta.aiSingerTitle: Best AI Singer Generator | Create Your AI Virtual Artist
Meta.aiSingerDescription: Create your own AI singer with unique voice, style, and personality. Generate original songs, covers, and performances in minutes — no recording studio required.

AiSinger.whyCard1Desc: Design your AI singer's unique look and visual style. Create a distinctive virtual persona that matches your brand and artistic vision.
AiSinger.whyCard2Desc: Create a one-of-a-kind AI voice that's exclusively yours. Train on any style — pop, rock, R&B, or classical — and own your singer's signature sound.
AiSinger.whyCard3Desc: From lyrics to full vocal performance in under 3 minutes. Generate original songs, covers, or harmonies without booking studio time.
AiSinger.howSubtitle: Three simple steps to create your AI singer and start producing music.
AiSinger.howStep1Desc: Upload a reference photo or describe the vision you want. Create any visual style you imagine.
AiSinger.howStep2Desc: Our AI learns your singer's unique vocal qualities in minutes. Fine-tune pitch, tone, and emotional expression.
AiSinger.howStep3Desc: Create unlimited songs, download in studio quality, and publish directly to streaming platforms.
AiSinger.inputSubtitle: Choose the input method that works best for your creative workflow.
AiSinger.input1Desc: Upload a song you love and let AI learn the vocal style, then apply it to your singer.
AiSinger.input2Desc: Describe your ideal voice: "warm female alto with jazz influences and subtle vibrato."
AiSinger.input3Desc: Provide melody and lyrics, and your AI singer performs them with natural expression.
AiSinger.input4Desc: Upload voice samples to create an AI version of any voice (with proper rights).
AiSinger.whoSubtitle: From bedroom producers to major labels, creators trust Tunee for professional AI vocals.
AiSinger.who1Desc: Perfect for solo artists who want backup vocals, harmonies, or a virtual duet partner. Create professional-quality vocal arrangements without hiring session singers.
AiSinger.who2Desc: Add polished vocals to your beats instantly. Test different vocal styles before committing to a human vocalist, or release AI-sung demos.
AiSinger.who3Desc: Develop virtual artist projects with full creative control. Reduce production costs while exploring new sounds and markets.
AiSinger.who4Desc: Give your virtual persona a singing voice. Perform live, create original songs, and engage your audience with musical content.
AiSinger.compareSubtitle: See why creators are switching to AI-powered vocal generation.
AiSinger.compareAi3: Any genre, any language, any time
AiSinger.exportSubtitle: Studio-quality audio ready for streaming, sync, and distribution.
AiSinger.faq1A: Tunee AI Singer is an all-in-one AI-powered virtual artist creation platform. You can create complete digital singers from scratch — including custom avatar visuals, unique voice identity, and original music — all without hiring vocalists, designers, or recording sessions.
AiSinger.faq2Q: What can I create with Tunee AI Singer?
AiSinger.faq2A: Tunee AI Singer covers the entire creative pipeline: generate stunning digital human avatars, customize unique singing voices, and produce original songs with AI-generated lyrics and melodies. From visual identity to vocal performance to complete music tracks — everything in one platform.
AiSinger.faq3Q: How does Tunee AI Singer work?
AiSinger.faq3A: Start by creating your singer's visual appearance with our AI avatar generator, then customize their voice characteristics or upload reference samples. Finally, generate complete songs with lyrics, melody, and vocals — Tunee handles everything from digital human creation to music production.
AiSinger.faq4Q: Can I customize both the voice and visual appearance?
AiSinger.faq4A: Yes! Tunee AI Singer lets you fully customize both aspects. Design your singer's visual avatar with AI-generated digital humans, and create their unique voice identity by describing characteristics or training on reference samples. Your AI singer is completely yours to define.
AiSinger.faq5Q: Can I use my AI singer commercially?
AiSinger.faq5A: Yes! All AI singers created with Tunee — including their avatar, voice, and generated music — come with full commercial rights. You can release songs, create music videos, monetize on any platform, and use them in advertisements — royalty-free.
AiSinger.faq6Q: What languages can Tunee AI Singer perform in?
AiSinger.faq6A: Tunee AI Singer supports all languages that the AI model can generate, including English, Japanese, Korean, Chinese, Spanish, French, German, and many more — with natural pronunciation and authentic accents.
AiSinger.faq7Q: Can I create an AI version of myself with Tunee?
AiSinger.faq7A: Absolutely! Upload your photos and vocal samples to Tunee to create a digital twin of yourself — complete with your likeness and voice — for demos, virtual performances, or creative experimentation while retaining full ownership.
AiSinger.ctaBody: Join 500,000+ creators who use Tunee to produce professional music and videos in minutes.

MVG.faq1Q: What is Tunee AI Music Video Generator?
MVG.faq1A: Tunee AI Music Video Generator is an advanced AI-powered tool that automatically creates stunning music videos from your audio tracks. Simply upload your song, and Tunee's AI generates synchronized visuals that perfectly match your music's mood, rhythm, and energy.
MVG.faq2Q: How does Tunee AI Music Video Generator work?
MVG.faq2A: Tunee's AI analyzes your music's tempo, beats, mood, and structure, then generates cinematic visuals that synchronize perfectly with your audio. You can customize the style with text prompts or reference images.
MVG.faq3Q: How long does Tunee take to generate a music video?
MVG.faq3A: Most music videos are generated by Tunee within 2-5 minutes, depending on track length and complexity. Longer tracks or 4K outputs may take slightly longer.
MVG.faq4Q: Is Tunee music video generator free to use?
MVG.faq4A: Yes, you can start creating AI music videos with Tunee for free. We offer paid plans starting at $18/month for additional features, higher quality exports, and unlimited generations.
MVG.faq5Q: What music file formats does Tunee support?
MVG.faq5A: Tunee supports MP3, WAV, and FLAC audio files. In the future, we will support pasting links from Spotify, SoundCloud, or YouTube for even easier music video creation.
MVG.faq6Q: Can I customize the visual style in Tunee?
MVG.faq6A: Absolutely! You can describe your desired visual style in natural language, or upload an image that Tunee's AI will animate and transform to match your music perfectly.
MVG.faq7Q: Are Tunee generated music videos royalty-free?
MVG.faq7A: Yes, all music videos generated with Tunee are royalty-free for commercial use. You retain full ownership and can publish on YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, or any platform.
MVG.faq8Q: What makes Tunee different from other AI video generators?
MVG.faq8A: Tunee is specifically designed for music creators, with advanced audio analysis that ensures perfect synchronization between your music and the generated visuals — something generic AI video tools can't match.

LipSync.faq1Q: What is Tunee AI Lip Sync?
LipSync.faq1A: Tunee AI Lip Sync is an advanced AI technology that automatically synchronizes any portrait image — photos, illustrations, or AI-generated faces — with audio to create realistic talking and singing videos without filming or motion capture.
LipSync.faq2Q: How does Tunee AI lip sync technology work?
LipSync.faq2A: Tunee's AI analyzes your audio track to detect speech patterns, syllables, and rhythm. It then generates precise mouth movements and facial expressions that match perfectly with your audio, applied to any portrait image you provide.
LipSync.faq3Q: What types of images work best with Tunee Lip Sync?
LipSync.faq3A: Any clear portrait image works great with Tunee — photos, illustrations, AI-generated faces, or even stylized artwork. The face should be clearly visible and ideally facing forward for best results.
LipSync.faq4Q: How long can Tunee lip sync videos be?
LipSync.faq4A: You can create lip sync videos up to 60 seconds long with complete vocal tracks using Tunee. This is perfect for music video clips, social media content, and promotional videos.
LipSync.faq5Q: Is Tunee lip sync feature free to use?
LipSync.faq5A: Yes, you can start creating lip sync videos with Tunee for free. We offer paid plans starting at $18/month for additional features, higher quality exports, and longer video durations.
LipSync.faq6Q: Can I use my own music or vocals with Tunee Lip Sync?
LipSync.faq6A: Absolutely! You can upload your own audio files (MP3, WAV, FLAC) or use Tunee-generated AI music. Tunee's AI will sync the lip movements to whatever audio you provide.
LipSync.faq7Q: Are Tunee lip sync videos royalty-free for commercial use?
LipSync.faq7A: Yes, all lip sync videos generated with Tunee are royalty-free for commercial use. You retain full ownership and can publish on any platform, monetize your content, and use them for marketing.

AiDancing.who1Desc: Create viral dance content without learning choreography. Perfect for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. Make your avatars and photos dance to trending songs and watch engagement soar. Generate multiple versions quickly for A/B testing.

AiDancing.exportSubtitle: Your dance video, ready for TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and beyond.
AiDancing.faq1A: Tunee AI Dancing is an advanced AI-powered tool that transforms any static image into a dynamic dancing video. Simply upload a photo of a person, character, or avatar, and our AI generates realistic dance movements synchronized to music or your chosen style.
AiDancing.faq2Q: What types of images work best?
AiDancing.faq2A: Clear portrait photos with visible full or upper body work best. The AI can handle photos, illustrations, anime characters, 3D renders, and even stylized artwork. For best results, use images with good lighting and a clear view of the subject.
AiDancing.faq3Q: How long does it take to generate a dance video?
AiDancing.faq3A: Most dance videos are generated within 1-3 minutes, depending on video length and complexity. Longer dance sequences or higher resolutions may take slightly more time.
AiDancing.faq4Q: Can I use my own music?
AiDancing.faq4A: Yes! You can upload your own music track, and our AI will automatically synchronize the dance movements to match the beat, tempo, and rhythm of your song.
AiDancing.faq5A: Tunee supports a wide variety of dance styles including hip hop, K-pop, contemporary, ballet, street dance, salsa, and more. You can also describe custom choreography in natural language.
AiDancing.faq6Q: Is the AI Dancing feature free to use?
AiDancing.faq6A: Yes, you can start creating AI dance videos for free with limited generations. Paid plans starting at $18/month offer unlimited generations, higher quality exports, and additional features.
AiDancing.faq7Q: Can I use the generated videos commercially?
AiDancing.faq7A: Absolutely! All dance videos generated with Tunee are royalty-free for commercial use. You retain full ownership and can publish on any platform, use in advertisements, or monetize freely.
AiDancing.faq8Q: How is this different from other video tools?
AiDancing.faq8A: Tunee's AI Dancing is specifically designed for creating realistic human movement from static images. Unlike generic video generators, our AI understands human anatomy, dance mechanics, and music synchronization for natural-looking results.

MotionControl.faq1Q: What is Tunee AI Motion Control?
MotionControl.faq1A: Tunee AI Motion Control is an advanced feature that lets you precisely define and control camera movements, object motion, and scene dynamics in AI-generated videos. Unlike random AI generation, you set the exact parameters for how elements should move.
MotionControl.faq2Q: How does Motion Control differ from regular AI video generation?
MotionControl.faq2A: Regular AI video generation produces motion based on prompts alone. Motion Control adds a layer of precision — you define keyframes, paths, timing, and easing curves, giving you director-level control over every movement in your video.
MotionControl.faq3Q: What types of motion can I control?
MotionControl.faq3A: You can control camera movements (pan, tilt, zoom, dolly, orbit), object motion within the scene, transition timing, motion blur, and easing curves. The system supports both simple linear motion and complex multi-axis choreography.
MotionControl.faq4Q: Do I need technical skills to use Motion Control?
MotionControl.faq4A: No! While Motion Control offers advanced capabilities, we've designed it with an intuitive visual interface. Beginners can use presets and simple sliders, while pros can dive into keyframe editors and custom curves.
MotionControl.faq5Q: Is Motion Control included in all Tunee plans?
MotionControl.faq5A: Basic motion control features are available in all plans. Advanced features like multi-track motion, custom easing curves, and high-frame-rate exports are available in our Pro and Business plans starting at $18/month.
MotionControl.faq6Q: Can I export motion data for other software?
MotionControl.faq6A: Yes, Tunee Motion Control supports exporting camera data in standard formats compatible with After Effects, Blender, and other professional video editing and 3D software.
MotionControl.faq7A: Yes, all videos generated with Tunee Motion Control are royalty-free for commercial use. You retain full ownership and can use them for any purpose including monetized content and client work.
